hooks.command: b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "main" ] || [ "$b" = "master" ]; then echo 'Refusing to edit on the default branch. Create a feature branch first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d).on("end",()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(s).tool_input.file_path||"")}catch{}})' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.py) { command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv run --quiet ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; } || { command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; } || true;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.css|*.json) command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;; esac; exit 0
